recommendations.title: A Dog's Journey
recommendations.overview: A dog finds the meaning of his own existence through the lives of the humans he meets.

recommendations.title: The Vast of Night
recommendations.overview: At the dawn of the space-race, two radio-obsessed teens discover a strange frequency over the airwaves in what becomes the most important night of their lives and in the history of their small town.

recommendations.title: A Boy and His Dog
recommendations.overview: Set in the year 2024 in post-apocalyptic America, 18-year old Vic and his telepathic dog, Blood, are scavengers in the desolate wilderness ravaged by World War IV, where survivors must battle for food and shelter in the desert-like wasteland. Vic and

recommendations.title: Drishyam 2
recommendations.overview: 7 years after the events of Drishyam, the family lives with the trauma from that fateful night. A gripping tale of an investigation and a family threatened by it. Will Georgekutty be able to protect his family this time?

recommendations.title: The Platform
recommendations.overview: A slab of food descends down a vertical facility. The residents above eat heartily, leaving those below starving and desperate. A rebellion is imminent.

recommendations.title: Into the Forest
recommendations.overview: In the not too distant future, two young women who live in a remote ancient forest discover the world around them is on the brink of an apocalypse. Informed only by rumor, they fight intruders, disease, loneliness & starvation.

recommendations.title: Project Almanac
recommendations.overview: A group of teens discover secret plans of a time machine, and construct one. However, things start to get out of control.

recommendations.title: Flashback
recommendations.overview: A female lawyer travels back in time and crosses paths with other women in history who fought for women's rights.

recommendations.title: Ravenous
recommendations.overview: In an isolated rural community of Quebec, Canada, some inhabitants attack other people, hungry for human flesh. A few survivors gather and go deep into the forest to escape them.

recommendations.title: Matango
recommendations.genres: Horror, Science Fiction, Thriller, Drama, Mystery, Fantasy
